name: Lemon-Sage Tortellini w/ Chicken & Peppers
recipeIngredient: 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breast halves
1 roasted red bell pepper, cut into thin strips
salt and coarsely ground black pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook tortellini in boiling water according to instructions on the package.
2. Meanwhile, melt butter and olive oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat.
3. Add chicken breast, salt, and pepper, and stir-fry for about 3 minutes.
4. Add red bell pepper strips, turn down the heat to medium, and cook until chicken and peppers are done, stirring periodically.
5. Add smoked turkey or chicken strips and fresh sage (or dried sage added earlier), and stir-fry until heated through.
6. Add tortellini, lemon rind, lemon juice, and parsley. Adjust seasoning with more salt and pepper if needed.
7. Stir for a minute or two to heat and mix everything together.
Serves about 6.
